name: Prompt Engineering
description: Advanced prompt engineering techniques and patterns for maximizing LLM performance, including few-shot learning, chain-of-thought prompting, template systems, system prompt design, and agent persuasion principles based on Anthropic best practices and Meincke et al. (2025) research

findings_summary.notes: Prompt-only skill (SKILL.md, no scripts or hooks). Content is well-structured, research-backed (cites Anthropic best practices and Meincke et al. 2025), and covers practical patterns including few-shot learning, chain-of-thought, token efficiency, and persuasion principles. No executable code, no network calls, no data exfiltration risk. Parent repo (NeoLabHQ/context-engineering-kit) is active with 532 stars, 50 forks, GPL-3.0 license, last pushed 2026-02-24. Organization account with 10 subscribers and 2 open issues. Stars significantly higher than recorded (532 vs 433 in metadata). Skill directory contains only SKILL.md with no additional attack surface.

scan_summary: SKILL.md only - no scripts, hooks, or executables. Content verified as educational prompt engineering reference material. No security concerns identified.
